description_long: This object is a cylindrical beverage can with a smooth, metallic surface and a vibrant blue color. The front features the stylized script text 'Two-Thirty' in white, running diagonally across the can. The top is silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism, typical of soda or energy drink cans. The can's body is seamless and unadorned except for the branding, with no visible dents or additional graphics. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The can is likely made of aluminum and is designed to contain a carbonated or non-carbonated drink.
description: A glossy blue beverage can with 'Two-Thirty' written in white script and a silver pull-tab top. The can is sleek, metallic, and unadorned except for the branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Two-Thirty' script in white on the blue can, with the silver pull-tab top visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain blue surface of the can, with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the uninterrupted blue surface and the silver top, with no branding visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view highlighting the blue body and the pull-tab top, with no visible text.
